chunks.title: Nebuchadnezzar's Introduction
chunks.reason: The king addresses all nations to declare the signs and wonders of God.

chunks.title: Nebuchadnezzar's Dream Narrative
chunks.reason: The king recounts his dream of the great tree and its interpretation by Daniel.

chunks.title: Daniel's Interpretation and Advice
chunks.reason: Daniel explains the dream to the king and offers counsel on how to mitigate judgment.

chunks.title: Fulfillment of the Prophecy
chunks.reason: The narrative describes the king's pride, the divine voice, and his temporary madness.

chunks.title: Nebuchadnezzar's Praise
chunks.reason: The king restores his sanity and offers a testimony of God's eternal sovereignty.
